---
title: "Analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
author:
  - "Aleksandar Neshov"
  - "Dinh Marcus Nguyen"
  - "Alexander Toropov"
date: today
---

## Placeholder Heading

## Research Question 1

## Research Question 2

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

source("scripts/rq2_recovery_trend_plot.r")

trend_lm
```
